title: indigofera bufalina
intro: Indigofera bufalina, also known as Ox-Tongue or Bufalin, is a type of flowering plant in the pea family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Indigofera bufalina include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Indigofera bufalina can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
